steps.title: Separate the two sentences
steps.content: The first idea is complete after audiences across the world. The next idea begins with a participial phrase, Utilizing vivid pastel colors, and leads into the complete clause her photos captivated viewers. Without a period, the opening modifier has nowhere clean to attach.

steps.title: Choose the sentence break
steps.content: Choice A fuses world and utilizing. Choice B creates faulty coordination. Choice C uses only a comma between sentence units. Choice D ends the first sentence and lets Utilizing introduce the next complete sentence. The answer is D.
